prompt: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same poster composition and character placement but transform it into a creepy-cute children's crayon drawing. Keep the woman peeking from the right with the knife and the broken-door framing, but simplify everything into hand-drawn colored-pencil/crayon textures on a clean white paper background. Replace the dark horror mood with playful kindergarten art elements while preserving the unsettling scene underneath. Add exactly 2 smiling clouds, 1 rainbow arch above the character, 1 teddy bear at the bottom left, 1 bunny at the bottom right, 1 lollipop on the left, 1 wrapped candy near the title, 6 stars scattered around, and 3 small hearts. Redraw the movie title at the bottom as large rainbow crayon letters reading “THE SHINING,” with each letter brightly colored and childlike. Make it look naïve, cheerful, scribbly, and imperfect, but still subtly eerie.
